name: The Rebuild: Inside the Montreal Canadiens
original_name: La reconstruction : au coeur des Canadiens de Montréal
overview: The Montreal Canadiens continue to evolve with the sole objective of re-establishing the team as an NHL powerhouse. Up close with players, coaches, executives and diehard Habs fans, The Rebuild: Inside the Montreal Canadiens reveals the 2023-24 behind-the-scenes story of an iconic sports organization undergoing profound change.
